groups.title: Control
groups.description: Runtime handoff, diagnostics, publishing evidence, and support surfaces that stay behind the developer branch.

groups.title: Architecture
groups.description: Repo maps, graph views, and architecture tooling for engineering follow-through.

groups.title: Labs
groups.description: Future product tools and experimental workflows that still need workshop time before they graduate.

tools.title: Changelog
tools.description: Developer publishing ledger, work evidence, and draft notes.

tools.title: Watchdog
tools.description: Full drawing telemetry, collector health, and Runtime Control handoff for machine-local support work.

tools.title: Command Center
tools.description: Suite doctor, local stack diagnostics, and incident controls for the shared runtime-core lane.

tools.title: Developer Docs
tools.description: Runbooks and workshop guidance that support local development and staged rollout work.

tools.title: Automation Studio
tools.description: Combined review bench for markup intent, terminal routing, and package-scoped automation receipts.

tools.title: AutoDraft Studio
tools.description: Markup-driven CAD automation workspace with review-first compare and execution flows.

tools.title: AutoWire
tools.description: Deterministic wire and conduit routing workflows staged as a future customer-facing automation surface.

tools.title: Ground Grid Generation
tools.description: Grounding geometry capture and generation workflows that still need lab-stage refinement.

tools.title: Batch Find & Replace
tools.description: Review-first drawing cleanup plus file and CAD replacement from one local workshop surface.

tools.title: Architecture Map
tools.description: Hotspot and refactor map for repo structure, extraction pressure, and module ownership.

tools.title: Architecture Graph
tools.description: Alternative node-link explorer for the same architecture and memory model used in the map.

tools.title: Whiteboard
tools.description: Developer sketching and note capture surface for experiments, workflows, and support callouts.
